ben-rust-2026.description: Multi-year 1120S reconstruction (2017-2025). Elder law attorney. P&L delivered, awaiting client responses.
awaiting: $1,497/month recurring payment identification (probably Lawyers With Purpose)
Check images or register for 168 checks ($63K)
ben-rust-2026.summary: Reconstructed 9 years of bookkeeping from bank statements. Elder law S-Corp shows consistent 64% net margins — lean operation with heavy software investment (28% of expenses). 1,030 items ($264K) need client verification before finalizing returns.

ops-general.description: Internal ops, tooling, and automation for the firm
ops-general.summary: Ongoing operational improvements including TaxDome workflows, API integrations, and agentic automation. Current focus: bookkeeping reconstruction skill and employee portal.

lienequity-fund.description: RWA tokenization fund — pay off IRS liens for equity stakes in property appreciation
lienequity-fund.summary: Novel fund concept targeting $20-25M AUM. Pay off IRS tax liens for homeowners in exchange for equity participation. Jon's EA network = natural deal sourcing moat. 8 failure modes stress-tested; execution risk is primary threat.

bookkeeping-portal.description: Employee portal for AI-assisted bookkeeping reconstruction
bookkeeping-portal.summary: Internal tool for CLAW staff to submit client bank statements and receive AI-processed P&L reconstructions. Leverages bookkeeping-reconstruction skill v2.5.

emails.subject: April Fools
emails.preview: Some of your children asked me to write a CBT for them to prank you. I wanted to give you a heads up in case you wanted to play along and prank them back.
